metadata.name: unionllm
metadata.summary: A Python library for unified access to Chinese domestic large language models.

functions.name: unionllm.main.unionchat
documentation: This is the new function to simplify calling

classes.name: unionllm.exceptions.ProviderError
documentation: Exception raised when there is an issue with the model provider.

classes.name: unionllm.exceptions.APICallError
documentation: Exception raised when an API call fails.

classes.name: unionllm.exceptions.ContextWindowExceededError
documentation: sub class of rate limit error - meant to give more granularity for error handling context window exceeded errors

classes.name: unionllm.exceptions.APIError
documentation: raise this when the API returns an invalid response object - https://github.com/openai/openai-python/blob/1be14ee34a0f8e42d3f9aa5451aa4cb161f1781f/openai/api_requestor.py#L401

classes.name: unionllm.exceptions.APIConnectionError
documentation: raised if an invalid request (not get, delete, put, post) is made

class_variables.name: unionllm.utils.ModelResponse.id
documentation: A unique identifier for the completion.

class_variables.name: unionllm.utils.ModelResponse.choices
documentation: The list of completion choices the model generated for the input prompt.

class_variables.name: unionllm.utils.ModelResponse.created
documentation: The Unix timestamp (in seconds) of when the completion was created.

class_variables.name: unionllm.utils.ModelResponse.object
documentation: The object type, which is always "text_completion"

class_variables.name: unionllm.utils.ModelResponse.system_fingerprint
documentation:
This fingerprint represents the backend configuration that the model runs with.

Can be used in conjunction with the `seed` request parameter to understand when
backend changes have been made that might impact determinism.

class_variables.name: unionllm.utils.ModelResponse.usage
documentation: Usage statistics for the completion request.
